description_long: This is a set of two metal lockers, commonly found in urban environments such as schools, gyms, or public facilities. The larger unit features three vertical doors, each with a vented panel at the top for airflow and a small round handle for access. The smaller unit is a single-door locker, matching the design and color scheme of the larger one. Both lockers have a blue front with visible signs of wear and a black or dark gray frame and sides, giving them a utilitarian and slightly aged appearance. The backs and sides are plain, with no visible openings or features. The lockers are designed to be freestanding and provide secure storage for personal belongings.
description: A pair of freestanding metal lockers with blue vented doors and black frames, showing signs of wear. The set includes a three-door unit and a single-door unit, typical for urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue vented locker doors on the left unit and one on the right unit, with visible handles and a worn finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow black sides of both lockers, with no visible doors or vents.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, solid black backs of both lockers, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow black sides of the lockers, mirroring view 1.
